case_title: ZUKOWSKI, STANLEY VS MOONEY, JOYCE MGR SUTTER APARTMENTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,168.29 FILED BY ZUKOWSKI, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT MOONEY, JOYCE MGR  SUTTER APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE AGAINST DF/J.DEBTOR MOONEY, JOYCE MGR SUTTER APARTMENTS:ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MOONEY, JOYCE MGR  SUTTER APARTMENTS
THE DEF./J.DEBTOR FILED"STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE & DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE,&ORDER";REQUEST FOR DISMIS- SAL, FOR JUDGE'S SIGNATURE.
SUBPENA DUCES TECUM AS TO JOYCE MOONEY/SUTTER APARTMENTS POS FILED
JUDGE SIGNED"STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT&DIS MISS WITH PREJUDICE,&ORDER",FILED 8/19.
COPIES OF SIGNED JUDGE ORDER&REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE DTD&SIGNED BY CLERK MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES 8/20.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZUKOWSKI, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOONEY, JOYCE MGR  SUTTER APARTMENTS $1,168.29 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,203.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
